heading: Today
text: Sun mixing with some afternoon clouds.  Breezy and milder.  Highs in the 50s, near 60 in the warmer valleys west and south.  South winds 10 to 15 mph east, and 10 to 25 mph, gusting 30 to 40 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Tonight
text: A few evening clouds, an isolated shower near and north of the Quebec border, then mostly clear.  More clouds in the St. Lawrence Valley late.  Lows in the 30s, some cool spots east near 30, and low 40s in the broader valleys west.  South winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting 25 to 35 mph through the evening, diminishing to light outside the Champlain Valley.

heading: Friday
text: Morning sun south and east giving way to clouds.  Showers developing late morning in the St. Lawrence Valley, spreading east and south to Rt. 4 and the White Mountains in the afternoon.  Highs in the 50s north of Rt. 4, upper 40s in northern NY, 60s south.  Light winds, becoming southwest near 10 mph.
